heading: POSTAL SERVICES, COMPLAINTS, AND JUDICIAL REVIEW
label: V POSTAL SERVICES, COMPLAINTS, AND JUDICIAL REVIEW
notes: Prior ProvisionsA prior subchapter V was redesignated subchapter VI of this chapter.

Amendments2006—, , , redesignated subchapter IV of this chapter as this subchapter and substituted “POSTAL SERVICES, COMPLAINTS, AND JUDICIAL REVIEW” for “POSTAL SERVICES AND COMPLAINTS” in subchapter heading.Pub. L. 109–435, title II, § 204(a)(1)120 Stat. 3210Dec. 20, 2006
